NAVAREA XIX 124/25
 1. RIGLIST. CORRECT AT  250630 UTC SEP 25
 NORWEGIAN SEA: NORTH OF 65N, EAST OF 5W.
  
 72-29.10N 020-20.90E TRANSOCEAN ENABLER
 71-21.52N 022-24.85E COSL PROSPECTOR
 68-08.65N 007-25.90E TRANSOCEAN SPITSBERGEN
 65-49.30N 007-43.10E SCARABEO 8
 65-06.50N 006-47.40E FLOATEL SUPERIOR

 NOTES:
 A. RIGS ARE PROTECTED BY A 500 METRE SAFETY ZONE.
 B. FOR RIGS LOCATED SOUTH OF 65N, REFER TO NAVAREA I WARNINGS OR VISIT WWW.UKHO.GOV.UK/RNW
 2. CANCEL NAVAREA XIX　116/25
